title: CraftClap
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey of adventure and exploration in a vanilla style.
body:
# CraftClap 

Embark on an exhilarating journey of adventure and exploration, where you will face challenging bosses in epic battles. Traverse vast, uncharted landscapes, uncover ancient ruins, and unravel hidden mysteries at every turn.

Your mission will be to defeat powerful enemies and showcase your bravery and skill in each encounter. Unlock new abilities and weapons as you progress, strengthening your character for the challenges that lie ahead.

But adventure isn't just about combat. You can also revel in the tranquility and beauty of nature. Plant your own crops, tend to your gardens, and harvest the fruits of your labor. Agriculture will be essential for your survival and will provide you with fresh ingredients for cooking delicious meals.

Cooking will play a pivotal role in your journey. Experiment with different recipes and ingredients to create unique and nourishing dishes that will help you regain strength and obtain special bonuses. Discover culinary secrets and share your creations with fellow adventurers along your way.

***For a better experience add this datapack to your worlds:*** [SASSOT+Better Combat Supporting Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sassot+better-combat-supporting-data-pack) with [Global Datapacks]( https://modrinth.com/mod/datapacks)

***Recommended Ram 6gb***

**Server side Coming soon**

## Credits for mods which are not yet on the modrinth platform

<sub>If you are the creator of any of the following mods and you don't want your mod to be in this modpack for any reason, let me know so I can unlink it immediately, the last thing we want is to inconvenience the amazing creators of these mods.	<sub>

Resource packs:

[Enhanced Hud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-hud)

[Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations)

Mods:

[Better Third Person](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person)

[Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue-fabric)

[Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)

[Menulogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/menulogue)

[Too Fast](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-fast)
